original_text:
### Contrast
- **Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]
- Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. **Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
- **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

relations.note: The approved and prohibited color pair guidance operationalizes the required contrast testing.
Both accessibility requirements apply to meaningful text and color treatments.

quotes: **Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

rules.intent: Ensure text remains legible and meets the stated accessibility threshold.
rules.rule_text: Test every text/background pair using webaim.com or an equivalent tool. Meet WCAG AA minimums: 4.5:1 for body text and 3:1 for large text (at least 24px, or 19px bold).

quotes: Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.
**Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Prevent contrast failures while reserving gold tones for their approved emphasis roles.
rules.rule_text: Use the known-safe text/background combinations: Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003d74), Dark Navy (#011e45), or Graphite (#212121) on White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#e6f0f9), or Golden Sand (#fef1c8); and White (#ffffff) on Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003d74), or Dark Navy (#011e45). Do not use Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White (#ffffff); golds are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

quotes: **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Make meaning available to people who cannot distinguish the color cue.
rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning; pair color cues with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
